title: Spike: image compression format benchmark (PNG vs JPEG vs WebP)
description:
## GH: https://github.com/civictechdc/votecatcher/issues/113

Benchmark PNG/JPEG/WebP for OCR accuracy vs file size. Test with real petition crops. Must be supported by all 3 providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral).

**Deliverable:** Format recommendation with accuracy numbers.
